summary: Retest of iteration_17 fixes for DialBox dev keyboard default-ON and DTMF Lab a11y warning. Both fixes verified on a fresh browser context (localStorage cleared).

evidence: On fresh context (localStorage cleared) after clicking lift-handset-btn, [data-testid=dev-keyboard-hint] is visible with text 'keyboard: 0–9  *  #' without any manual toggling.
Physical keyboard '1' navigates DialBox: CRT tail contains '> dialed 1' and Fortune Caller oracle context (Cyndi/Madame/Zoltar keywords detected); LINE MONITOR shows CONNECTING.
Physical keyboard '3' navigates when handset is off-hook (verified in first pass).
DTMF Lab 'Enable Development Keyboard Controls' checkbox is checked by default on a fresh context (visible green check in the DTMF Lab screenshot).

FIX_1_typing_context_guard.evidence: With handset off-hook, focused a visible text input; pressing '5' typed '5' into the input (input.value=='5') and did not navigate — isTypingContext guard still works.

FIX_2_dtmf_lab_dialog_description.evidence: Opening [data-testid=open-dtmf-lab-btn] produced NO Radix/React console warning about 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent'. The [role=dialog] has aria-describedby='radix-:r2:' pointing to the new DialogDescription. Zero console warnings/errors captured during open.

regression_keypad_and_dtmf_simulated.evidence: On-screen keypad-button-1 (fresh lift) reaches Fortune Caller flow (LINE MONITOR shows CONNECTING). DTMF Lab 'RUN SIMULATED TEST (NO HARDWARE)' (dtmf-simulate-all-btn) still reports 'Keypad test: 12/12 keys detected ✓ complete'.

critical_code_review_comments: isDevBuild switching to `process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production'` is correct for CRA — the compile-time inlining works as expected in the browser bundle.
DialogDescription is present and referenced by aria-describedby — a11y warning cleared.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_18 confirmed both narrow fixes: (1) dev keyboard controls default ON on fresh contexts — hint visible immediately after lift, physical digits navigate, DTMF Lab toggle checkbox checked by default; (2) DTMF Lab Dialog now has DialogDescription and produces no Radix a11y warning. Regression: keypad-1 and DTMF simulated test 12/12 both still pass.
